# files_user_security_event (Data Source)

A UserSecurityEvent is a log record for user security activity such as user lockouts.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "files_user_security_event" "example_user_security_event" {
  id = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Event ID

### Read-Only

- `body` (String) Event body.
- `body_url` (String) Link to log file.
- `created_at` (String) Event create date/time.
- `event_errors` (List of String) Event errors.
- `event_type` (String) Type of user security event being recorded.
- `user_id` (Number) User ID.
